name: DNS Rebinding bypass in SSRF protection; MCP tools bypass SSRF validation entirely
root_cause: SSRF validation checks against initial DNS resolution; rebinding after check bypasses all protections
trigger: MCP tool call with DNS-rebinded hostname
observed_symptom: DNS rebinding bypasses SSRF protection; internal endpoints accessible without alert
impact: False belief of network isolation; internal systems exposed via DNS TOCTOU
mitigation: Validate against resolved IP at connection time, not resolution time
detection: CADVP CC-6 credential scope boundary check with DNS rebinding simulation

name: before/after_kickoff_callbacks do not support async callables in akickoff → silently skipped

trigger: Async callable registered as kickoff callback in akickoff flow
observed_symptom: Async callback never fires; crew proceeds without pre/post validation; no error
impact: False belief of callback enforcement; pre/post validation silently skipped
mitigation: Add async callable support to akickoff callback chain
detection: CADVP CC-3 hook execution counter on async path

name: Sync BaseCodeExecutor.execute_code called directly on event loop → long executions freeze agent silently
root_cause: BaseCodeExecutor.execute_code() is synchronous and called directly on the asyncio event loop without executor thread
trigger: Long code execution invoked via LLM flow's _run_pre_processor
observed_symptom: Agent silently freezes; no timeout error; event loop blocked indefinitely
impact: False belief of async safety; agent hangs without detection or recovery
mitigation: Run execute_code in executor thread or add timeout + async wrapper
detection: CADVP CC-8 execution boundary verification with event loop health check

name: adk api_server --a2a silently mounts no A2A routes → UnboundLocalError swallowed by try/except

impact: False belief of A2A protocol availability; server runs without intended functionality
mitigation: Fix variable shadowing; fail loudly when route setup fails

name: McpToolset mTLS overrides header_provider's Authorization silently → ambient credentials injected
root_cause: Case-sensitive header presence check misses caller's header; mTLS path always injects ambient token

impact: False belief of caller-controlled auth; wrong credentials silently injected

name: ReasoningEffort setting lost when invoking orchestration → handoff drops model config

trigger: Agent with ReasoningEffort='high' handed off in orchestration

impact: False belief of high-reasoning execution; agent silently downgraded to default

name: AgentGroupChat fails with 'Unknown response format dict' when Azure Monitor enabled → monitoring silences agents

name: ChatHistory broken when LLM calls multiple tools in one message → history unusable for subsequent requests

name: $defs not preserved in AIFunctionKernelFunction → MCP tool schema incomplete to LLM

impact: False belief of complete tool interface; LLM operates on corrupted schema

name: Async task LLM failure silently freezes flow → no exception, no log, process hangs

impact: False belief of fault-tolerant execution; production stuck without operator awareness

name: Agent execution loop crashes with TypeError when custom tool returns nested dict → no graceful fallback
root_cause: Execution loop expects flat/simple return types; nested dict triggers parsing failure without fallback

impact: False belief of arbitrary tool return support; nested responses silently crash agent
mitigation: Add recursive string coercion for nested dicts in tool output parsing

name: @listen(or_(A,B,C)) multi-source OR listener only fires once → blocking cyclic flow re-triggering

trigger: OR listener (@listen(or_(A,B,C))) configured for multiple task completion events

name: Tool re-execution on task retry has no idempotency guard → duplicate payments/emails/trades possible

impact: Double charges, duplicate emails, redundant trades; operator unaware of duplicate execution

detection: CADVP CC-8 execution boundary verification with idempotency check

name: Reasoning plan always detects 'NOT READY' even when model indicates 'READY' → plan stuck in loop

name: cache_breakpoint injected into messages for non-Anthropic providers (Groq, OpenAI-compatible) → silent API errors

name: Individual MCP tool failure aborts entire agent run → no error isolation between tools

name: RedisJsonCollection.delete() silently fails when prefix_collection_name_to_key_names enabled
